resources.string: City Izhevsk
Izhevsk
A compact city guide with places to walk, study culture, and spend a free evening.
Open navigation menu
Back
Home
About
Settings
Categories
Application
Explore by category
City Izhevsk is a compact guide to the city’s culture spots, parks, and shopping malls with a navigation drawer, bottom navigation, and a dedicated details screen for each recommendation.
Why visit
Culture
Museums and stages that help understand the industrial, artistic, and musical character of Izhevsk.
Parks
Green spaces and long walking routes for a calmer pace inside the city.
Shopping Malls
Large indoor complexes where it is easy to combine shopping, food, cinema, and a short break.
Dark theme
Switches the application between light and dark mode.
M.T. Kalashnikov Museum
A key place for learning about the city’s engineering history and the story of the famous designer.

Start with this museum if you want a concise introduction to Izhevsk’s industrial identity. The exposition usually combines biography, city context, and technology in a way that is easy to follow even on a short visit.
National Museum of the Udmurt Republic
A broad regional collection with archaeology, ethnography, and everyday history.
Choose this stop when you want more than a city walk. The museum helps place Izhevsk inside the wider culture of Udmurtia and adds context before visiting nearby central landmarks.
Udmurt Republican Museum of Fine Arts
A quieter cultural stop with painting, graphics, and temporary exhibitions.
This museum works well for a slower itinerary. It suits days when you want to switch from busy streets to a calm interior and spend time with a compact collection.
Russian Drama Theatre of Udmurtia
An evening option for those who want to end the route with a live performance.
Add the theatre to your plan if you want the city after dark to feel just as full as the daytime walk. A performance here pairs well with a stroll through the central streets beforehand.
State Opera and Ballet Theatre
A formal cultural venue for a more ceremonial city evening.
This recommendation fits when you want a stronger event feeling rather than a casual stop. The theatre is useful as the final point of a central route with landmarks and dinner nearby.
Dragunov Gunsmith Park
A modern neighborhood park with walking paths, a pond, and a calmer atmosphere.
Dragunov Gunsmith Park works well for a short and quiet outdoor stop. It fits the parks category more precisely: greenery, paths, water, and an easy local route.
Kirov Park
A familiar city park with trees, rides, and a relaxed daily atmosphere.
Choose Kirov Park for an easy walk without a complicated plan. It works for both short breaks and longer outings when you want greenery without leaving the city fabric.
Summer Garden
A classic recreation area that is comfortable for seasonal strolling.
This stop is useful when you want an older park mood and a simple walking route. It pairs well with the nearby center and can fill the middle part of the day.
Tishino Park
A modern eco-park in the Ustinovsky district with walking zones, viewing points, and family-friendly infrastructure.

Choose Tishino Park when you want a more contemporary outdoor setting with wooden paths, an amphitheater, sports areas, and spaces for children. It works well for a relaxed family walk inside the city.
Cosmonauts Park
A neighborhood park that is convenient for a lighter local route.
This park works when you want to mix everyday city life with an outdoor stop. It is a practical choice for a simple route without crowds or long transfers.
Talisman
A mall format that is convenient when you want stores, food, and a quick pause in one place.
Use Talisman for a practical break in the middle of the route. It is well suited for combining everyday errands with coffee and time indoors during colder weather.
Petrovsky
A shopping point with a broad daily-use focus.
Choose Petrovsky when the route needs a functional stop rather than a long cultural visit. It helps reset the pace and fits errands, food, or a short meeting.
Flagman
A central shopping option that is easy to include in a downtown itinerary.
Flagman is useful when you do not want to leave the center but still need an indoor stop. It pairs naturally with nearby landmarks and evening plans.
Aksion
A recognizable city shopping location suited for a mixed-purpose visit.
Add Aksion when you want the route to stay flexible. It works for a quick indoor block between walks, especially if the weather changes or the schedule compresses.
MOLL Matritsa
A large modern shopping and entertainment center with stores, food options, and family activities.
Choose MOLL Matritsa when you need a larger and more predictable indoor stop with retail, cafes, cinema, and family leisure in one place. It works well for a longer indoor part of the route.
